name: pnu
description: PNU — Prontuário Unificado (protótipo acadêmico). Monorepo: backend Express + PostgreSQL e frontend React + Vite.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.serve: npm run build && npm run start
